# Snowflake Permission Error Fixtures
# These represent authorization/privilege failures

## Pattern 1: Insufficient privileges
002003 (42501): SQL access control error: Insufficient privileges to operate on table 'ANALYTICS.PUBLIC.SALES'

## Pattern 2: Not authorized
ProgrammingError: User 'DEMO_USER' is not authorized to perform operation SELECT on object 'SECURE_VIEW'

## Pattern 3: Permission denied
Permission denied: ROLE 'ANALYST_ROLE' does not have USAGE privilege on WAREHOUSE 'COMPUTE_WH'

## Pattern 4: Access denied
Access denied for ROLE 'READER_ROLE' on DATABASE 'RESTRICTED_DB'. Contact your Snowflake administrator to request access.

## Pattern 5: Grant missing
Operation failed: No grant exists for the requested operation. Use GRANT <privilege> TO ROLE <role>
